originalTitle: The 20 best-performing stocks in the S&P 500 for the first half of 2026
summary: The list is dominated by semiconductor and computer-hardware manufacturers.
content: The list is dominated by semiconductor and computer-hardware manufacturers.

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
